[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001000 4
1 000000001 1
2 000100010 2
3 000000000 a
4 010001111 5
5 000110111 5
6 111000110 5
7 001001000 2
